km.Bodiam, Sussex, England: បូឌិaម, ស៊ូសេច, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam是Roger de Bodiam的兒子，出生在英國素可波迪亞姆。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam是Roger de Bodiam的儿子，出生在英国素可波迪亞姆。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bodiam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam was born in Bodiam, Sussex, England as the son of Roger de Bodiam. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam est né à Bodiam, Sussex, Angleterre, fils de Roger de Bodiam. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam wurde in Bodiam, Sussex, England, als Sohn von Roger de Bodiam geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam è nato il nel Bodiam, Sussex, England come figlio di Roger de Bodiam. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam(은)는 영국 수세스 보디암에서 Roger de Bodiam의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam nasceu em Bodiam, Sussex, Inglaterra filho de Roger de Bodiam. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam родился в местности бодям, суссекс, Англия. Его отца звали Roger de Bodiam. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: William de Bodiam nació en Bodiam, Sussex, Inglaterra como hijo de Roger de Bodiam. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
